intro: Richterago arenaria, also known as Arenaria sibirica or Siberian sandwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and improving overall immune function. The bioactive constituents of Richterago arenaria include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in the form of capsules or infusions to leverage its potential health benefits.
